title: 🦞 OpenClaw x Discord Server Integration Guide | Meta Intelligence
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

`openclaw config set channels.discord.botToken "YOUR_DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN"`. `openclaw config set channels.discord.enabled true`. `openclaw config set channels.discord.applicationId "YOUR_APPLICATION_ID"`. `openclaw config set channels.discord.guildId "YOUR_GUILD_ID"`. `[discord] Bot connected as OpenClaw Agent#1234`. openclaw config set channels.discord.intents.messageContent true. openclaw config set channels.discord.intents.guildMembers true. openclaw config set channels.discord.intents.guildPresences false`. `openclaw config set channels.discord.dmPolicy "owner_only"`. openclaw config set channels.discord.groupPolicy "allowlist". `openclaw config set channels.discord.groupPolicy "denylist". openclaw config set channels.discord.deniedChannels '["1111111111111111111"]'`. openclaw config set channels.discord.allowedUsers '["USER_ID_1", "USER_ID_2"]'`. openclaw config set agents.default.skills.discord.commands '[. `openclaw config set channels.discord.autoThread true. openclaw config set channels.discord.autoThreadChannels '["1234567890123456789"]'`. openclaw config set channels.discord.forumAutoReply true. openclaw config set channels.discord.forumChannels '["FORUM_CHANNEL_ID"]'`. openclaw config set channels.discord.rateLimit.perUser 5. openclaw config set channels.discord.rateLimit.perChannel 20. openclaw config set channels.discord.rateLimit.message "Please wait and try again, maximum 5 messages per minute."`. openclaw config set channels.discord.triggerMode "mention". openclaw config set channels.discord.maxResponseTokens 1024`. openclaw config set channels.discord.logging true. openclaw config set channels.discord.alertThreshold.messagesPerMinute 50`. The complete **OpenClaw Discord setup** process covers Bot creation, Token and Gateway Intents configuration, groupPolicy channel permissions, and Slash Commands deployment, taking approximately 15-20 minutes.

Read https://www.stack-junkie.com/blog/which-chat-app-works-best-with-openclaw and follow the instructions to help me with: Best Chat App for OpenClaw: Telegram, Discord, or Slack?. OpenClaw (previously known as Clawdbot and Moltbot) connects to Telegram, Discord, Slack, Signal, WhatsApp, and several other platforms through a single gateway process. For running multiple channels at once (say, Telegram for personal use and Discord for a team), see OpenClaw multi-agent and multi-channel setup guide. Telegram is the fastest, most stable path to a working OpenClaw setup. There's no `openclaw channels login` step for Telegram. Full setup: OpenClaw Telegram Setup Guide. ## Slack setup for OpenClaw: Socket Mode and token requirements. Setup uses `openclaw channels login --channel whatsapp`, which launches a QR code scan on first run.

title: 🦞 How to Set Up OpenClaw Cron Jobs (With Examples You Can Copy)
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# OpenClaw cron jobs: automate your AI agent while you sleep. * OpenClaw (previously known as Clawdbot and Moltbot) has built-in cron jobs that let your agent run tasks on a schedule without you being present. * What are OpenClaw cron jobs. ## What are OpenClaw cron jobs. Cron jobs are scheduled tasks that your OpenClaw agent executes automatically. An agent with cron jobs runs scheduled tasks at 7 AM, backs up files every hour, and sends weekly reports without manual triggering. Just tell your agent what you want scheduled and it will create the cron job for you. > "Create a cron job that runs every morning at 7 AM UTC. When a cron job runs in the main session, it has access to the full conversation history. For a complete walkthrough of building a morning briefing cron job, see OpenClaw Morning Briefing: 10-Minute Setup That Actually Works. Q: How many cron jobs can I run? * OpenClaw documentation on cron jobs.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw: Setting Up Cron Jobs for Autonomous AI Task Scheduling
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

#### OpenClaw: Agentic AI for Developers. # Setting Up Cron Jobs. Explore how to configure cron jobs in OpenClaw to enable your AI assistant to perform scheduled tasks autonomously. Understand the difference between main session and isolated modes, learn to create, manage, and debug cron jobs, and discover practical uses like morning briefings and reminders. You send a message, and your agent responds. Cron jobs are the mechanism that makes this possible. They allow you to schedule your agent to execute tasks on a fixed rotation. ## How does the cron system work? Cron runs inside the Gateway, not inside the model. The Gateway wakes up at the right time, triggers the agent, and handles delivery. Jobs are stored at `~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json` and run history is logged per-job. If your Gateway is running, your cron jobs are running. Every cron job runs in one of two modes, and choosing the right one matters. The agent picks it up on the next heartbeat, ...

title: 🦞 OpenClaw Cron Scheduled Tasks Guide | MI - 超智諮詢
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# OpenClaw Cron Scheduled Tasks Guide. Diagram of OpenClaw Cron scheduled task automation execution. If you're familiar with Linux's `crontab`, OpenClaw's Cron is conceptually similar -- it automatically executes tasks at specified times. But the key difference is: traditional crontab executes fixed Shell commands, while OpenClaw's Cron executes **natural language instructions**, with the AI agent autonomously deciding how to complete them. If a Cron task's execution time exceeds this value, the Gateway will forcibly terminate the connection, causing the task to be truncated -- the agent may have completed 80% of the work, but cannot return results due to the timeout. Cron is the key feature that transforms OpenClaw from a "passive tool" into a "proactive assistant." Once configured, the agent automatically executes tasks and reports results at your specified times -- you don't need to remember what to check, don't need to open a terminal, and don't need to be at the computer.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw Tip #2: Set Up Cron Jobs for Automated Daily Tasks
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# OpenClaw Tip #2: Set Up Cron Jobs for Automated Daily Tasks. OpenClaw cron job automation - futuristic clock mechanism with digital circuits. One of OpenClaw’s most powerful features is its built-in **cron job scheduler**. ## How OpenClaw Cron Jobs Work. Cron jobs run inside the Gateway process, not the AI model itself. Jobs are persisted at `~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json`, so they survive restarts. ## Creating Your First Cron Job. ## Useful Cron Job Ideas. ## Managing Cron Jobs. # Run a job manually. openclaw cron run <job-id>. openclaw cron runs --id <job-id>. openclaw cron delete <job-id>`. **Pro tip:** Schedule resource-intensive cron jobs during off-peak hours (late night) to avoid hitting API rate limits during your active working hours. ##### Michael So Shares AI Publication at Hong Kong Legislative Council with Councilors Lau Chi-pang and Chan Hok-fung. ##### From 0 to 1 Deploying WuKong: Standard SOP for Enterprise AI Implementation. ##### Why Enterprises Need WuKong: Three Major Pain Points of AI Transformation and How to Break Through.
